definition.name: Primary Deity
definition.description: Primary deity or deity group displayed as Made for.

definition.name: Primary Deity Reference
definition.description: Canonical deity_group metaobject for deity-first navigation and structured compatibility.

definition.name: Compatible Deities
definition.description: Other deity groups this product can be suitable for.

definition.name: Compatible Deity References
definition.description: Canonical deity_group metaobjects this product can fit or be positioned for.

definition.name: Compatibility Class
definition.description: Deity Specific, Multi-Deity, General/Common, or Festival Specific.

definition.name: Ornament Type
definition.description: Crown, short necklace, long haram, earrings, vaddanam, nose ring, hands and legs, etc.

definition.name: Ornament Type Reference
definition.description: Canonical deity_ornament_type metaobject for filtering and deity-first grouping.

definition.name: Size Profile Reference
definition.description: Canonical deity_size_profile metaobject for reusable idol size guidance.

definition.name: Crown Size Standard Reference
definition.description: Canonical deity_crown_size_standard metaobject for crown fit guidance.

definition.name: Idol Height Min Inches
definition.description: Minimum suggested idol height in inches.

definition.name: Idol Height Max Inches
definition.description: Maximum suggested idol height in inches.

definition.name: Idol Head Width Min Inches
definition.description: Minimum suggested idol head or face width for crown fit.

definition.name: Idol Head Width Max Inches
definition.description: Maximum suggested idol head or face width for crown fit.

definition.name: Ornament Height Inches
definition.description: Measured ornament height in inches.

definition.name: Ornament Width Inches
definition.description: Measured ornament width in inches.

definition.name: Ornament Depth Inches
definition.description: Measured ornament depth or arc in inches where relevant.

definition.name: Crown Style
definition.description: Open back, full round, hair crown, flat back, tall mukut, or other crown shape.

definition.name: Crown Inner Width Inches
definition.description: Usable inside crown width at the head contact point.

definition.name: Crown Outer Width Inches
definition.description: Maximum outside crown width for visual scale.

definition.name: Crown Inner Circumference Inches
definition.description: Usable inside circumference for full-round crowns.

definition.name: Crown Arc Length Inches
definition.description: Measured arc length for curved or open-back crowns.

definition.name: Placement
definition.description: Head, forehead, ears, neck, chest, waist, hands, feet, arch, or base.

definition.name: Regional Names
definition.description: Regional and alternate names customers may search for.

definition.name: Not For Deities
definition.description: Deity groups this product should not be positioned for.

definition.name: Not For Deity References
definition.description: Canonical deity_group metaobjects this product should not be positioned for.

definition.name: Size Confidence
definition.description: Measured, Measured from product image, Owner confirmed, Inferred, or Check product image.

definition.name: Fit Notes
definition.description: Plain-language fit caveats and size guidance.

definition.name: Quality Checks
definition.description: Quality checks performed before packing and shipping.

definition.name: Set Items Included
definition.description: Items included in a set.

definition.name: Optional Items
definition.description: Optional add-ons or custom items.

definition.name: Component Count
definition.description: Number of included components.

definition.name: Range Type
definition.description: Deity, regular dance, premium kemp, black kemp, or related range.

definition.name: Primary Deity Reference
definition.description: Primary deity_group metaobject for deity-first collection pages.

definition.name: Deity Group References
definition.description: All deity_group metaobjects represented by this collection.

definition.name: Primary Ornament Type Reference
definition.description: Primary deity_ornament_type metaobject for this collection.

definition.name: Ornament Type References
definition.description: Ornament families represented by this collection.

definition.name: Size Profile Reference
definition.description: Default deity_size_profile for collection-level fit guidance.

definition.name: Crown Size Standard Reference
definition.description: Default deity_crown_size_standard for crown collection guidance.

definition.name: Collection Role
definition.description: shop_by_deity_root, deity_landing, deity_ornament, ornament_first, festival, or accessory.

definition.name: Deity First Enabled
definition.description: Marks collections that should participate in the future deity-first shopping path.

definition.name: Shopping Path Label
definition.description: Short public label for deity-first navigation, such as Amman Crowns.

definition.name: Display Title
definition.description: Short display title for collection cards and circular subcollection navigation.

definition.name: Parent Menu Handles
definition.description: Comma-separated menu handles used as fallback subcollection navigation.

definition.name: Category Node Reference
definition.description: Optional category node metaobject used by current circular subcollection navigation.

definition.name: FAQ Family
definition.description: FAQ variant for collection guide and schema, such as varalakshmi, crown, necklace, waist, vishnu, accessory, or decor.

definition.name: Regional Keyword Cluster
definition.description: Regional and alternate collection search terms used in visible copy and planning.

definition.name: Collection Intro
definition.description: Short buying intro for collection pages.

definition.name: Size Fit Intro
definition.description: Collection-level fit note for idol size, crown, and ornament measurements.

definition.name: Subcollections
definition.description: Curated child collections for current collection navigation circles.

definition.name: Parent Deity Collection
definition.description: Parent deity landing collection for deity-first subcollections.

definition.name: Related Collection References
definition.description: Sibling or related collections for curated shopping paths.

definition.name: Sort Priority
definition.description: Manual sort order for deity-first collection groups.
